lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Yesterday's two HIGHs are still wide open and nothing has been committed in the 24 hours since. The Discord release webhook (scripts/.discord_webhook.txt) is still tracked in git and ungitignored. The release-side dashboard writer still hardcodes barRaise.* = null, so the next release.ps1 run will overwrite today's verdict on the dashboard. The working tree has progressed on canonical-audit queue items (CLAUDE.md M2, three DESIGN.md alignment fixes) but those edits sit uncommitted alongside the write-dashboard git hardening. Product is healthy; operational scaffolding is treading water.
